questions.text: A prospect says, 'We are already working with your largest competitor.' Walk me through your response.
A prospect tells you the budget is gone for this fiscal year. How do you keep the opportunity alive?
What is the toughest objection you have ever faced, and how did you work through it?
A technical buyer raises a security concern you cannot answer in the moment. What do you do?
Tell me about a deal you lost. What would you do differently?
Walk me through your discovery call structure. What questions do you absolutely have to ask?
How do you decide when to advance a deal versus disqualify it?
Walk me through what your pipeline looks like at the end of a typical week.
A deal has gone dark for two weeks. What is your re-engagement playbook?
Walk me through how you build a mutual close plan with a champion at a complex enterprise.
Tell me about your largest deal. What made it close?
Describe a deal that should have closed but did not. What was the lesson?
Tell me about a difficult prospect you eventually won over.
Tell me about a quarter where you missed quota. What did you change for the next one?
Describe a time you received tough feedback from a sales leader. How did you act on it?
How do you decide which prospects deserve your time in a quarter?
Describe your ideal hand-off between SDR and AE. What information matters most?
Walk me through how you forecast a deal you think will close this quarter.
What is the difference between MEDDIC and BANT, and when do you reach for each?
How do you use AI tools in your daily sales workflow, and what is one decision you would not delegate to them?
